title: ext_type: file-signature@1
description: Extension block for file-format magic numbers / signatures — the leading (or offset) byte pattern that identifies a file format (PNG, PDF, ZIP, ELF, ...). Magic is recorded as space-separated printable hex bytes (e.g. '89 50 4E 47'); the optional ASCII rendering spells the printable form. Never store literal control bytes.

magic_hex.description: The signature bytes as space-separated uppercase hex (e.g. '89 50 4E 47 0D 0A 1A 0A'). This is the identifying pattern at `offset`.

offset.description: Byte offset within the file where the signature begins. Default 0 (start of file).

magic_ascii.description: Optional printable-ASCII rendering of the signature where meaningful (e.g. '%PDF', 'PK', 'GIF89a', '\x7fELF'). Non-printable bytes shown as escapes, never as literal control bytes.

extensions.description: Common filename extensions for this format (without the dot), e.g. ['png'], ['jpg','jpeg'].

trailer_hex.description: Optional trailing signature bytes (footer) as space-separated hex, where the format defines one (e.g. JPEG 'FF D9').

spec.description: Optional defining specification / authoritative reference (RFC, ISO, vendor spec).

notes.description: Optional gotchas / clarifications (variant signatures, container caveats, offset subtleties). Free text, one per item.
